_comment: Least-privilege IAM policy for S3 access. Follows AWS Security Best Practices.

_security_rationale.scope: Scoped to a single bucket ARN — never use wildcard '*' resource in S3 policies
_security_rationale.actions: Only GetObject and PutObject granted — no List, Delete, or ACL modification
_security_rationale.explicit_deny: DeleteObject denied explicitly as defense-in-depth even though it is not granted
_security_rationale.no_star_action: s3:* is intentionally avoided — violates least privilege and is a top cloud misconfiguration

Statement._comment: Grants read and write on objects only — not on the bucket itself
Allows listing objects in the specific bucket only — not all buckets in the account
Defense-in-depth: Deny always overrides Allow in IAM. Prevents accidental grants elsewhere.
Forces HTTPS-only access. Satisfies HIPAA §164.312(e)(1) encryption in transit requirement.
